description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit constructed from dark metal, featuring three spacious shelves. The shelves are loaded with a variety of brown cardboard boxes, some open and some closed, arranged in an orderly fashion. The frame is composed of thick, rectangular metal bars, providing strong support and stability. The open design allows for easy access to the contents from the front and sides, with no doors or handles present. The overall appearance suggests it is suitable for storage in garages, warehouses, or utility rooms. The utilitarian design and visible wear on the metal give it a practical, functional look.
description: A sturdy, dark metal shelving unit with three shelves, filled with brown cardboard boxes. Its open, industrial design is ideal for storage in urban utility spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three shelves filled with various cardboard boxes, clearly displaying the open structure and storage capacity.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the arrangement of boxes, with the metal frame's thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the boxes and the open framework, emphasizing the shelf's accessibility from both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the shelf depth and the open, slatted metal construction.
